case_title: FAMILY HEALTH & WELLNESS DBA MISSION MKT. MED. GP VS OTUS, TROY T., ATTORNEY AT LAW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,884.00 FILED BY FAMILY HEALTH & WELLNESS DBA MISSION MKT. MED. GP AS TO DEFENDANT OTUS, TROY T., ATTORNEY AT LAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAMILY HEALTH & WELLNESS DBA MISSION MKT. MED. GP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTUS, TROY T., ATTORNEY AT LAW $3,380.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,380.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF IS OWED $2029 BY AURELIO (CERVANTES) CAVARUBIAS AND $2855 BY CAROLINA (CERVENTAS) CAVARUBIAS FOR CHIROPRACTIC SERVICES. DEFENDANT TROY T. OTUS IS AUTHORIZED AND ORDERED TO RELEASE TO PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $929.84 AND $2450.24, RESPECTIVELY OF FUNDS HELD IN TRUST FOR AURELIO & CAROLINA (CERVANTES) CAVARUBIAS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
